summary: Completed frontend testing of PropertyGram social media app features. Most core functionality working well, but authentication session management issues prevent messaging and profile access.

minor_issues.issue: Property creation restricted to sellers/agents only
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - buyers cannot create properties

minor_issues.issue: Area creation fails due to existing area
Brute force protection not working as expected (returns 401 instead of 429 on 6th attempt)

critical_bugs.issue: User sessions not persisting across navigation - users get redirected to login when accessing protected routes

integration_issues.issue: Enquire and Message buttons redirect to login page even when user is authenticated
Bottom navigation Profile button redirects to login instead of user profile

passed_tests: User profile page Posts and Places tabs
Tab switching (Following, For You, Move, Buy/Sell)
Book Viewing button opens inquiry modal
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication session management - JWT tokens are not persisting across navigation. Users get logged out when accessing protected routes like messaging (/messages/new/{userId}) and profile (/profile). Check AuthContext, token storage (localStorage/cookies), and protected route authentication logic.
